mapper.insert: INSERT INTO epub_annotations (user_id, book_id, zine_id, cfi, selected_text, color, note, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{zineId}, #{cfi}, #{selectedText}, #{color}, #{note}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM epub_annotations WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM epub_annotations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND book_id = #{bookId}
